title: Friendship (R-I9 / R-L8) — one learner's OWN-ROW view of a relationship with another user (status from the owner's perspective).

friend_id.description: The friend's identity key from the owner's perspective. Currently the normalized @handle (the engine's key until handle->uid resolution lands); becomes the resolved auth.users uuid when cross-user delivery ships. Stored as text.

status.description: FriendStatus.name from the owner's perspective: none|outgoing|incoming|friends|blocked (stored as text; the engine maps an unknown value to none for forward-compat).
